subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-04-06 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: It is amazing that people are afraid of physical afflictions, but have no worries of spiritual handicaps.
subcodes.first_line_orig: چقدر ناس از آفات جسمانی اضطراب دارند و از آفت
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
